creator: pluknet@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

There is a patch fixing a memory leak on amd64 available.

Patch for flow-tools ports which fixes memory leak on amd64.
Stealed from: http://www.mail-archive.com/flow-tools@list.splintered.net/msg01619.html

It should be put under ${FILESDIR} as port-flow-tools-amd64-memleak.patch
(patch name may be changed as appropriate).
Note: it collides with existing ${FILESDIR}/patch-lib_ftlib.h

I'm running with it on production servers.

Please report if the patch fixes the topic problem for all of you affected.

-- 
wbr,
pluknet
